title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 17
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people in a café.
questions.audio_script: Man: What are you ordering for a snack? || Woman: I wanted the chocolate cake, but it looks too sweet for me. || Man: The cheese sandwich looks good. || Woman: It does, but I'm not really hungry enough for bread. I think [1]I'll just get a yoghurt with fruit[/1]. || Man: Nice choice. I'm having that too. || Woman: Great. Could you save us a table near the window while I pay? The café is getting busy, and I don't want to sit outside. It's still cold today. || Woman: That should make things easier. || Woman: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost umbrella.
questions.audio_script: Man: Did you find your umbrella? || Woman: Not yet. I checked the train, because I was sure I had it there after travelling. || Man: And what about the bookshop? You went there afterwards. || Woman: I asked, but nobody had seen it. Just now, the receptionist phoned and said [1]my umbrella was beside the sofa in the waiting room[/1]. I'm going to collect it before the place closes. || Man: Good. You looked worried this morning. || Woman: I was. I need it for tomorrow, so that is a big relief. || Woman: That should make things easier.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are we still going to the tennis courts after work? || Woman: I don't think so. All the courts are booked for a competition. || Man: We could go to the gym instead. || Woman: Maybe, but I left my membership card at home. The dance class still has spaces, so [1]we're joining the dance class tonight[/1]. || Man: That sounds fine. Shall we meet outside the sports centre? || Woman: Yes, at four. Bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it at the desk. The bus is quicker. || Woman: That should make things easier.

questions.audio_script: Speaker: Hi, it's Oliver. I'm calling about tomorrow's art workshop. I told you it was at one, but that was my mistake. The artist arrives later than planned, and the room is not free after four. So [1]we need everyone there at quarter past two[/1]. You don't need to bring your brushes because there are some in the classroom. If you are late, wait by the reception desk and I'll come down during the break. I know this is short notice, but it should still finish before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Hi, it's Oliver. I'm calling about tomorrow's art workshop. I told you it was at one, but that was my mistake. The artist arrives later than planned, and the room is not free after four. So we need everyone there at quarter past two. You don't need to bring your brushes because there are some in the classroom. If you are late, wait by the reception desk and I'll come down during the break. I know this is short notice, but it should still finish before lunch.

questions.question: What time should the listener arrive for the art workshop?

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, analogue clock with hands at one o'clock and no numbers, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says everyone needs to be there at quarter past two.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the campsite.
questions.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting to the campsite on Monday? || Man: I was going to drive, but I don't have the car this week. || Woman: I can ask someone to drive us. || Man: That's kind, but buses do not go near the campsite. I checked the timetable, and [1]we can take the train to the village and walk from there[/1]. || Woman: Great. Does it leave near your house? || Man: Yes, every twenty minutes. Let's take the one after lunch so we don't have to rush. I already have a travel card. That makes it cheaper for me.

questions.context: You hear a customer talking to a shop assistant.
questions.audio_script: Assistant: Can I help you with those lamps? || Customer: Yes, I like the tall lamp, but it will not fit on my desk. My old lamp broke last week, so I need new ones today. || Assistant: We also have a silver wall light. || Customer: I cannot put anything on the wall. I just need something for reading in bed. || Assistant: In that case, try these. || Customer: Thanks. [1]I'll choose the small bedside lamp[/1], if you have them. || Assistant: I do. You can sit here while I get them from the store room.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about what to take.
questions.audio_script: Boy: Have you packed for the beach clean-up? || Girl: Almost. I put in a summer dress because the forecast was hot yesterday. || Boy: It changed this morning. The organiser said it may be cold while we stand near the sea. || Girl: Really? Then I should change something. || Boy: I would. [1]Bring your thick coat instead[/1]. || Girl: Good idea. I don't want to carry a sun hat all day, and the coat will fit in my small bag. I'll pack it now before I forget. Thanks for warning me. || Girl: That should make things easier.
